source: Path of Exile official terminology and PoE Wiki mechanics pages

Definition.text: Withered is a Debuff that causes the affected target to have increased Chaos damage taken.

Purpose.text: Apply a chaos-damage mitigation pressure channel from repeated Hit sources before damage is resolved by damage reduction/defence layers.

Core Rules.text: Each qualifying Hit can apply an independent Withered stack up to 15 stacks, 6% increased chaos damage taken per stack at base, with no duration refresh on additional applications.

Internal Rules.text: Each stack has independent duration and is treated as a separate debuff state for stacking and refresh behavior.

Calculation Order.text: 1) resolve Hit event 2) determine if Withered stack application occurs 3) assign base 2s stack duration 4) add stack if below 15 5) aggregate Chaos damage taken effect via stack breakpoint rounding

Priority Rules.text: Withered effect is applied in the independent-stack damage-taken debuff channel; interaction with other effects follows normal stack and replacement rules for separate debuffs.

Preconditions.text: Hit must be capable of inflicting Withered; target must accept the debuff stack.

Postconditions.text: Target gains one active stack of Withered for 2 seconds; if at max stacks, no additional stack is added.

Limitations.text: Max 15 active stacks; each stack duration is independent and does not refresh when reapplying while already present.

Caps.text: Stacks are capped at 15; effective increased chaos damage taken uses round-up breakpoint behavior.

Formula.text: Effective bonus is derived from 6% per stack with independent stacks; breakpoints in total increased chaos damage taken are rounded up.

cannot_affect: non-chaos damage channels from this mechanic

Conflicts.text: Independent stack behavior differs from single debuff refresh semantics.

Exceptions.text: Historical visual/effect changes are patch-dependent; see patch history entries.

Hidden Rules.text: Stack application reaches rounded breakpoints in multiples of about 16.67% effective bonus and is rounded up.

Developer Notes.text: Model Withered as independent stack debuffs rather than single-refresh duration.

Historical Changes.text: The debuff was assigned the name Withered in 3.4.0 and adjusted in later patch history.

text.note: Debuff from Wither assigned the name Withered and can be applied by Withering Touch Support.
Updated Wither debuff effect; rotating orbs removed.
Profane modifiers can cause Monsters to inflict Withered for 2s on Hit.

text: A first stack of Withered applies 2s duration; repeated hits can build independent stacks.
Each stack keeps independent timer and is not refreshed.
Withered is not a single timer aura
Each stack counts separately and caps at 15
